title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join our Engineering team. You will lead the design and development of scalable, high-performance web applications. Responsibilities include architecting backend services, mentoring junior engineers, conducting code reviews, and collaborating with product managers to translate business requirements into technical solutions. The ideal candidate has 5+ years of experience building production-grade software, strong fundamentals in data structures and algorithms, and a passion for clean, testable code. You will work in an agile environment with two-week sprints and drive the adoption of best engineering practices across the team.

title: Regional Sales Manager
description: We are hiring a Regional Sales Manager to drive revenue growth across the northern territory. You will manage a team of 8 account executives, own a $5M annual quota, and develop strategic account plans for enterprise clients. Key responsibilities include pipeline management, quarterly business reviews, competitive analysis, and close collaboration with marketing on lead generation campaigns. The ideal candidate brings 7+ years of B2B sales experience, a proven track record of exceeding targets, and strong leadership skills. Experience selling SaaS products to mid-market and enterprise customers is highly valued.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: We are looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize our multi-channel marketing campaigns. You will manage organic and paid channels including search, social media, email, and content marketing to drive brand awareness and qualified leads. Responsibilities include analyzing campaign performance using Google Analytics and marketing attribution tools, managing a monthly content calendar, and collaborating with the design team on creative assets. The ideal candidate has 3+ years of digital marketing experience, strong analytical skills, and a data-driven approach to marketing strategy.

title: HR Business Partner
description: We are seeking an HR Business Partner to serve as the strategic HR advisor for two business units comprising 200+ employees. You will partner with senior leaders to develop people strategies that align with business objectives. Key responsibilities include driving talent development programs, managing the annual performance review cycle, advising on organizational design, and handling complex employee relations cases. The ideal candidate has 5+ years of HR business partnering experience, strong knowledge of employment law, and excellent interpersonal skills. SHRM-CP or PHR certification is preferred.

title: Financial Analyst
description: We are hiring a Financial Analyst to join our FP&A team. You will build and maintain financial models, prepare monthly financial reports for executive leadership, and analyze business performance to identify trends and opportunities. Responsibilities include supporting the annual budget process, performing variance analysis, developing scenario models for strategic initiatives, and collaborating with department heads on cost optimization. The ideal candidate has 3+ years of financial analysis experience, advanced Excel skills, and a strong understanding of GAAP. A background in SaaS or technology companies is a plus.

title: Operations Manager
description: We are looking for an Operations Manager to optimize and scale our business operations. You will oversee daily operations across facilities, manage vendor relationships, implement process improvements, and ensure operational KPIs are met consistently. Key responsibilities include developing SOPs, leading cross-functional projects, managing a team of 12 operations coordinators, and reporting directly to the VP of Operations. The ideal candidate has 6+ years of operations management experience, a track record of driving efficiency improvements, and strong analytical and leadership skills. Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or higher is required.
